title: Secretariat of Environment and Natural Resources
description: Agreement that allocates to the service of the Municipality of Playas de Rosarito, Baja California, the area of 229.54 m² of federal maritime land area, as well as the existing works consisting of a stone wall, sidewalks and two metal signal postsento, located on Mártires de Pino Alto Avenue, Centro area, Municipality of Playas de Rosarito, State of Baja California, for use of public access to the beach, without authorization to carry out any type of work and/or installation.
